sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports a wound on his right foot and reports pain in the left hand. He also reports that the sock sticks to the wound. The patient reports a wound.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: Physical exam reveals a right foot wound. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a problem with a wound on his foot. The patient's symptoms are consistent with a possible infection.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: Start oral antibiotics. Follow up in 72 hours to assess wound healing. Advise patient to keep the wound clean and dry.
